obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1614_0: \ET* I wanna go look for her^1, but I.../
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1615_0: \EQ* I dunno^1, you don't need to be here alone^1, right?/%
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1634_0: \E2* Obviously we need to go Zorgon mode./%
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1646_0: \E0* Nah^1, not yet^1. You don't have enough practice./
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1647_0: \E2* Let's go up and down the beach./%
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1660_0: \E5* You don't need it again^1, dumbass!/
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1668_0: \ES* I dunno why^1, but I was.../
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1670_0: \ER* You were both acting kinda weird and.../
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1672_0: \EK* ..^1. I probably said something weird again^1, heh./%
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1690_0: * He..^1. he fell down^1? At the Festival?/
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1691_0: * ..^1. n-no^1, you're joking^1, right^1? He's just.../
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1721_0: * Just..^1. tell Susie I REALLY wanted to talk to her^1, but.../
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1722_0: * I just..^1. I just had to.../%
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1768_0: \Eo* Hey^1, Noelle!^1! You here!^1? They had to make more mint!!/%
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1798_0: \EH* Hey Kris^1, wake the hell up!/%
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1819_0: \E9* Hahahaha!^1! Dude^1, you look like a pineapple!/
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1845_0: \EZ* What^1? She had to..^1. go somewhere?/
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1847_0: \E9* So what^1, dumbass^1? That just means we gotta follow her^1, right?/
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_150_0: * (I know you wanted to deny it.)/
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_153_0: * (We're going to have to face the truth.)/%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_169_0: * (Every cell in my body was screaming at me to run away.)/
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_170_0: * (..^1. that if I stayed by your side any longer,)/
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_171_0: * (You were going to drag me down with you.)/
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_172_0: * (Drag me down somewhere no one is supposed to go.)/
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_174_0: * (And you know what terrified me the most about that?)/%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_261_0: * All I've been doing has just been.../%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_313_0: * It feels like..^1. I've just been watching myself through glass./%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_328_0: * Watching someone else move me through my life./%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_345_0: * That's why I want..^1. to do something crazy./%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_361_0: * That's why I want..^1. to break free./%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_380_0: * A Noelle that has to do Noelle things./%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_401_0: * Just like Kris has to do Kris things.../%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_431_0: \Eg* You found out how to stop being Kris!/
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_432_0: \Em* And no one else has noticed.../%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_456_0: \Ep* They don't want to see how INTERESTING you are now!/
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_457_0: \Em* They'll just keep marching down the same path.../
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_458_0: \En* Without even thinking where it goes!/%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_519_0: \Et* I felt stronger than I have in my entire life./%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_532_0: \Et* I know..^1. it's horrible^1. It's horrible to say that^1, but.../%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_548_0: \Ec* You..^1. if it's you telling me to^1, I can do anything./
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_549_0: \Ea* If you tell me to^1, I can do things that are impossible./
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_550_0: \Eb* Things no one else can do./%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_565_0: \Ea* So^1, why don't we do it?/%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_597_0: \Ei* And let's fly out of this stupid town!/
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_598_0: \Ep* To somewhere no one has ever been before!/%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_638_0: * The other side of the lake./
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_639_0: * We always wanted to see what was there^1, didn't we?/
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_640_0: * The four of us^1, when we were kids.../%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_651_0: \Ea* If you tell me to^1, I can do anything./%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_693_0: \Ej* The words..^1. I've been waiting to hear./%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_737_0: \El* Just like all the other times./%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_749_0: \Em* Kris^1, you're the one that wanted this^1, aren't you?/%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_754_0: \Eo* Stop pretending you're still the old Kris./
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_755_0: \Ei* You can't even say "stop" like you used to./%
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_833_0: \Ed* The water's..^1. nice^1, isn't it^1, Kris?/%
